description_long: This is a single athletic running shoe featuring a combination of mesh and synthetic materials in varying shades of blue and gray. The upper is predominantly light blue mesh with darker blue synthetic overlays, providing both breathability and structural support. The shoe has a standard lace-up closure with round laces and visible eyelets, and the tongue is padded for comfort. The midsole is white and appears to be made of lightweight foam, while the outsole is gray with a textured tread for traction. A prominent Nike Swoosh logo is visible on the side, and the overall design suggests it is intended for sports or casual urban wear.
description: A blue and gray athletic running shoe with mesh and synthetic overlays, white foam midsole, and a Nike Swoosh logo on the side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Nike Swoosh logo, mesh upper, and synthetic overlays.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the heel structure and back of the shoe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the mesh and synthetic material blend, with the Swoosh logo visible.
description_view_3: Front angled view focusing on the lacing system, toe box, and padded tongue.
attribute_logo: Nike Swoosh on the side in dark gray/black
